source_pr.title: executor, distsql: enhance mpp cooridnator to handle execption and execution summaries better
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #44032

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
Previously only root mpp tasks can "report" errors and execution summaries to tidb. However, when errors were passing among mpp tasks, secondary errors would happen and have chance to be report to tidb first. Besides, due to some limitation of TiFlash, execution summaries may fail to pass to root tasks even the total query completes without errors. So this PR will let every mpp task report directly to mpp coordinator to ensure first error message and execution summaries.

1. When MPPVersion >= 2 && TiDB status server is on, mpp coordinator address will be TiDB status server address, otherwise, an empty string. And it will be included in mpp task meta info.
2. When mpp coordinator address is not empty, and physical plan contains limit plan node, ReportExecutionSummary flag is set true in mpp task meta info.
3. MPP coordinator records the first error message, and will be used when root task report any errors
4. When mpp coordinator closes, if ReportExecutionSummary is true and no error happened during dispatch phase, the main goroutine will wait until all reports are received or after 3 seconds.
5. MPP coordinator manager is responsible for managing all mpp coordinators, and it will starts a background goroutine to timely detect and delete mpp coordinators lives over time due to unknown reasons.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
Run tiflash queries and check the behaviors in compilation failure, run failure, and normal success situations.
Will add new metrics to track mpp coordinator counter and received reports related metrics, and use them in endless tests like random failpoints.
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Fix the issue that mpp tasks with limit operator may lose execution summary.
Fix the issue that confusing error message may be returned to users when mpp tasks failed.
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: + race = "on",.
